name: libpackage-stash-perl
title: libpackage-stash-perl
summary: module providing routines for manipulating stashes
description:
module providing routines for manipulating stashes
Package::Stash is a Perl module that provides an interface for manipulating
stashes (Perl's symbol tables). These operations are occasionally necessary,
but often very messy and easy to get wrong.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libpackage-stash-perl because module providing routines for manipulating stashes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libpackage-stash-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libpackage-stash-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libpackage-stash-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
